title: All For Boosting Domestic Capacity For Sustainable Export Earnings
description: During the 2022 Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) annual conference held in Lagos on Saturday, with the theme: ‘Boosting Domestic Capacity For Sustainable Export Earnings”.
